sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, number Float64, weight UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, number, weight) VALUES (1, 1.5, 1), (2, 2.5, 2), (3, 3.5, 1), (4, 4.5, 1);
UPDATE test_table SET weight = 3 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(number, weight) AS median_value FROM test_table;
